_comment: Manual price overrides for cards TCGPlayer + dotgg don't cover. Entries with `price: null` are skipped by the importer — fill in a number to apply. Once applied, these pin FOREVER until you remove the entry here, because TCGPlayer/dotgg imports skip rows where price_source='manual'. Sources to research: Cardmarket (EU), eBay sold listings, Collectr app, TCGKing blog.

OP10-108_p2.note: Scratchmen Apoo alt_art — extra variant beyond TCGPlayer listings

OP12-020_p2.note: Roronoa Zoro SERIAL — rare, check eBay sold

_chase_overrides: Cross-verified 2026-06-11 (TCGPlayer market-history + PriceCharting sold-counts + eBay raw, graded excluded). These had phantom dotgg asking-price values; dotgg backfill now caps at $300 so they cannot recur automatically.

OP05-119_p2.note: Gear5 Luffy MANGA SEC (tcg 527026). Raw ~$5700: TCGPlayer hist $5700 + PriceCharting $6000/49 sales + eBay $3k-5.7k. Was phantom $87500. NOTE: r2 shares tcg_id 527026 (conflation).

OP05-119_r2.note: CONFLATION: shares tcg_id 527026 with OP05-119_p2 (the real Manga SEC); 'Reprint' label is wrong. Left NULL until variant remap. Was phantom $87500.

OP09-118_p2.note: Gol.D.Roger MANGA SEC EN (tcg 597065). Raw ~$3750: PriceCharting EN $3742/38 sales + eBay $3.5-6k. Was phantom $29995 (TCGPlayer listed-median, 0 sales).

OP13-118_p3.note: Luffy RED Super Alt Art ('Red Manga', tcg 657401). Raw ~$8500: PriceCharting $8522/23 sales; TCGPlayer chart $8849. Was phantom $59999. (p2=standard manga $2189 via tcgplayer is correct.)

OP03-114_p3.note: Charlotte Linlin CHAMPIONSHIP 2024 promo (NOT alt-art). Raw ~$880: PriceCharting EN $876 + TCGPlayer last-market $898. Was phantom $4999.99 (seller sold-out placeholder).

OP05-091_p3.note: Rebecca CHAMPIONSHIP 2024 promo (NOT alt-art). Only 1 raw comp (~$1157, CN print); too thin to pin. NULL until a real EN raw sale. Was phantom $7000.

EB01-012_p3.note: Phantom dotgg asking-price ($1700), NULL'd by $300 ceiling 2026-06-11. Research real raw value before pinning.

OP04-083_p2.note: Phantom dotgg asking-price ($927), NULL'd by ceiling. Shares value with r1 — conflation smell. Research.

OP04-083_r1.note: Phantom dotgg asking-price ($927), NULL'd by ceiling. Shares value with p2 — conflation smell. Research.

OP01-078_p2.note: Phantom dotgg asking-price ($785), NULL'd by ceiling. Research real raw value.

P-119.note: Portgas.D.Ace promo base — truly not on TCGPlayer
